Hey!
Support us at {eventName} and take a shift.
table.name: Name
registration.zx_help_title: Why do we need your ZX username?
registration.zx_help_body: We only need your ZX username to send an email to your student email address. After the event, the ZX username will of course be deleted immediately and will not be used by us for anything else.
toast.register.success: Your registration has been saved. If you want to cancel your shift, you can use the link in the confirmation email.
toast.register.failure:
Error: confirmation email could not be sent (unknown ZX username).

No entry was created in the shift plan.
toast.register.no_space: Unfortunately, this shift is already full!
toast.register.disabled: Registration for this event has been disabled.
toast.unregister_dialog.title: Cancel registration
toast.unregister_dialog.question: Do you really want to cancel your shift?
toast.unregister.success: You have successfully cancelled your shift.
toast.unregister.unknown: Error: unknown fingerprint or cancellation has already been completed.
toast.unregister.disabled: Cancellation for this event has been disabled.
